description_long: This object is a modified baseball bat with a weathered wooden body and a dark, slightly glossy handle. The most striking feature is the addition of two circular saw blades, mounted perpendicularly through the barrel near the thicker end, giving it a menacing, improvised appearance. The wood shows signs of wear, scratches, and discoloration, suggesting heavy use or intentional aging. The saw blades are metallic, with visible teeth and a slightly rusted, blood-stained look, adding to the object's aggressive aesthetic. The handle appears to be wrapped or stained darker for grip, while the rest of the bat retains a natural wood grain. No visible logos, brand markings, or decorative elements are present aside from the functional modifications.
description: A weathered wooden baseball bat with two circular saw blades embedded near the barrel, giving it a rugged, improvised weapon look.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full length of the bat and both saw blades clearly, with the handle and barrel visible.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the elongated wooden body and the perpendicular placement of the saw blades.
description_view_2: Top-down view emphasizing the circular arrangement of the saw blades and the rounded end of the handle.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the bat's length and the saw blades' alignment, with more detail on the wood's texture.
